answer:
The carrier frequency is the midpoint between the maximum and minimum frequencies:  
\( f_c = \frac{100.02 + 99.98}{2} = 100 \, \text{MHz} \).  
The carrier swing is \( 100.02 - 99.98 = 0.04 \, \text{MHz} = 40 \, \text{kHz} \), so the frequency deviation is half that, \( 20 \, \text{kHz} \).  
The modulation index is \( \beta = \frac{20 \, \text{kHz}}{3 \, \text{kHz}} \approx 6.667 \), matching option F.

\boxed{F}
